creator: a.ulasov@gmail.com
text:
I tried to start openvpn on FreeBSD 9.3-RELEASE-p7, but unfortunately I've got same error =(.

/usr/local/etc/rc.d/openvpn start              
Starting openvpn.
Assertion failed: (_limit - _cursor >= 0), function -[TRConfigLexer fill:], file TRConfigLexer.re, line 117.
Abort trap (core dumped)
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/openvpn: WARNING: failed to start openvpn

I rebuilt all dependent ports WITH_DEBUG=yes and attached new backtrace output. Also I attached OS and packages info.
